economic_notes: Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership operated independently; Nation holds $500,000 advance plus $3,166,556 accumulated equity. FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (1,014 units) and FN (PTP) General Partner Inc. (1 share) also held.
notes: Audit is qualified: property and equipment comprehensive listing per PS-3150 not completed, affecting property/equipment values and equity but not operating surplus. Replacement and operating reserves ($126,526) included in liabilities as restricted cash. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Carrier Sekani + CMHC + FNHA + NHA + PGNAETA + Province of BC = 3,914,309 plus Ottawa Trust = 3,915,477; 'Other and resources' ($2,925,280) and 'Rent and sales' ($116,893) treated as OSR. No remuneration schedule included in provided documents. Annual debt service uses 2022 scheduled principal repayment of $123,744.
